hero.sub: Premium factory-direct cabinetry with 2-week local delivery. Serving contractors, designers, and homeowners across Canada.

services.title: Factory-Direct Sourcing
services.desc: We manufacture every cabinet in our own facilities, eliminating middlemen and passing savings directly to our dealers and clients.

services.title: Local Canadian Inventory
services.desc: Our Aurora warehouse stocks over 10,000 units at all times, enabling fast turnaround for residential and commercial projects.

services.title: Design Consultation
services.desc: Our in-house design team provides complimentary 3D renderings and personalized product recommendations for every project.

services.title: Warranty & After-Sales
services.desc: All products are backed by our 5-year structural warranty and 1-year finish warranty, with dedicated after-sales support.

story.p1: GoldenHome has been delivering high-quality cabinetry solutions since 1999, building a strong global foundation across multiple markets. Today, GoldenHome Cabinetry Eastern Canada brings that experience closer to home through a growing local manufacturing and supply network based in Ontario.
story.p2: With integrated warehousing and local production capabilities, we are able to support projects with greater speed, flexibility, and consistency. From in-stock cabinetry to locally customized solutions, our approach is designed to meet the needs of contractors, designers, and homeowners across Canada.

product_cards.title: Kitchen Cabinets
product_cards.desc: From classic shaker to contemporary flat-panel, our kitchen cabinet lines offer versatile styles for every design vision.

product_cards.title: Closet & Storage
product_cards.desc: Maximize every inch with our modular closet systems, designed for bedrooms, walk-ins, and utility spaces.

product_cards.title: Bathroom Vanities
product_cards.desc: Elegant vanity collections that combine smart storage with refined aesthetics for any bathroom style.

product_cards.title: Custom Solutions
product_cards.desc: Need something unique? Our team works with you to create custom cabinetry tailored to your exact specifications.

cta.heading: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.sub: Get a free design consultation and quote from our expert team.
